title: metastelma schaffneri
intro: Metastelma schaffneri, also known as the Mexican climbing milkweed or Schaffner's metaphyllo, is a perennial vine native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, characterized by its clusters of small, purple flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential treatment for wounds and skin conditions. Metastelma schaffneri is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antimicrobial protection. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
